The '''Knights' Billet''' was a set of dormitories located in the [[Jedi Temple dormitory|accommodation sector]] of the [[New Jedi Temple|Temple]] of the [[New Jedi Order]].

==History==
Upon the defeat of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Cal Omas]] commissioned the building of a new Jedi Temple for the reformed Order to replace the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|structure]] originally [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|routed]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Built by the [[Reconstruction Authority]], the new Temple's interior was constructed using old blueprints salvaged during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The Knights' Billet was completed along with the rest of the Temple, though it is unknown if it was a new addition or a reconstruction.<ref name="DNIII" />

During the [[Dark Nest Crisis]], the majority of the Order's [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] were away from the Temple, on missions tracking [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] or working with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]] in the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]], leaving the Billet nearly deserted. Recently declared [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] ordered Knights [[Lowbacca]], [[Tesar Sebatyne]], and [[Tahiri Veila]] to meet him and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Cilghal]] in the Billet to discuss their suspected involvement in a security breach between the Order and [[Bornaryn Trading]]. Finding the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] and [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] Jedi waiting in the conversation salon, the Grand master allowed Jedi Veila to continue her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] training in the exercise pen. Veila eventually entered the room to step into a argument between the Masters and the Knights. Skywalker asserted that the Knights were still under the influence of [[Raynar Thul|UnuThul]] of the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] and were leaking Order secrets in an attempt to influence the [[Jedi High Council (New Jedi Order)|High Council's]] decision to make a preemptive strike on the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] and Killik forces. After constant deflecting and pointless accusations, Skywalker deemed the Jedi as [[Joiner|Killik Joiners]] and sent them on meditative retreat to [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]; stating that failure to remain on Dagobah would be seen as their resignation.<ref name="DNIII" />

==Layout==
Located within the Temple's accommodation sector, the Billet was made up of several private sleeping chambers for use by the Order's many Jedi Knights. This tenth floor accommodation suite was complimented by a conversation salon, snack galley, and exercise pen. The salon contained several tables and chairs which could be utilized by Knights engaged in deep, thoughtful discussion about politics or [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. The exercise pen, located at the end of the main hallway, had a [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] window giving those in the hall a view of those training inside.<ref name="DNIII" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''
